description: Set agent altitude high-level vs low-level
example: You are a staff engineer reviewing

description: Higher altitude = more autonomy broader scope
Lower altitude = more constraints specific files
Never mix altitudes in one prompt
Reference memory files instead of inlining
Send file paths not file contents
Use deltas Since last session X changed to Y
Explicitly state when tools may run
FORBIDDEN git commit push production deploy
Define done as checklist not vague statement
No secrets or PII in code or logs
